## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and implementation for AI growth series](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Revised content calendar structure aligns well with original vision; will be managed in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Webstacks to tackle thought leadership pieces (2/month) to set tone and perspective for other content](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Considering innovative "doclet" feature for content presentation, balancing SEO and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Plan to launch initial content by month-end, with ongoing weekly deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

## Topics

### Content Calendar and Structure

  - [Jessalynn created revised content calendar based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [65+ pieces of content organized into chapters](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Webstacks to contribute thought leadership pieces (2/month)](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Calendar to be managed in Airtable for tracking and assignments](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Aim to set weekly deadlines and launch initial content by month-end](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

### Content Presentation Strategy

  - [Jesse proposed using Webstacks' "doclet" feature for content display](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Concept: Publish individual blogs under AI topic, with a "homepage" acting as table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Doclets allow content to be repurposed across site (e.g., capabilities pages)](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Balancing SEO benefits of individual blogs with cohesive guide experience](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Team to further discuss implementation details next week](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### SME Interviews and Content Input

  - [Jesse conducting internal and client interviews](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Jessalynn provided general SME questions; can provide more detailed ones if needed](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Interview insights to add personality and human element to articles](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Jesse to align interviews with upcoming content schedule](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Project Management and Collaboration

  - [Airtable to be used for tracking content progress and assignments](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Jesse to review calendar and provide feedback for next week's kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Team to establish clear weekly deliverables and overall launch timeline](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse to review content calendar and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Team to finalize content presentation strategy early next week](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Begin content production with focus on thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
  - [Set up Airtable for project management and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
  - [Establish weekly deadlines and overall launch timeline](https://fathom.video/share/GNBjtuKQJ54LT_YCC2NM6_xnLMTFq-Br?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
